summary: Replaced grid with brilliant cyan emissive grid 400x400m, opacity 0.85, canvas 1024px double-pass, GridHelper overlay, pulse animation
Added 50+ luminous wireframe buildings in 270deg arc at 150-300m, clusters, searchlights, data bridges, FogExp2 0.0015
Built procedural Recognizer: head 8x3x4m + 2 legs 2.5x10x3m + feet, black MeshStandard #111111 + red EdgesGeometry #FF0000, at (75,0,-50)
Added 6 terrain patches with 4-octave all-positive Perlin noise (peaks 8-19m), studios flat radius 15m, 8m transitions
Imported 14 Omniverse GLB props with PBR textures, 45 instances across 5 studios. Added asset routes, loadProp function, keepOriginalColors=true
Restored all procedural objects in 5 studios (trees, fountain, hologram, gym equipment, furniture) that were accidentally removed. Now stacked: procedural + GLB props

Session covered: sol cyan brillant, Tron City skyline (50+ buildings), Recognizer U-shape, terrain relief Perlin (all-positive peaks 8-19m), 14 GLB props import (45 instances), restore procedural studio props. All 5 studios now have BOTH procedural objects AND GLB props stacked. web_viewer.py is ~2800 lines. Viewer live at http://192.168.0.70:8080/. Kanban tasks 2379-2381 done. preserveDrawingBuffer added for screenshots. Next: await further directives from STRAT/Nuage.
